task: Verify page load and console errors
operation_sequence: 1. Open the homepage (index.html). 2. Open Developer Tools. 3. Check the Console tab for any errors.
expected_result: The page loads completely. The console shows no errors (especially no 404s for images, stylesheets, or scripts).
criteria: Pass: No errors. Fail: Any blocking error or missing resource (e.g., 404).

task: Verify navigation menu links on the homepage
operation_sequence: 1. Locate the main navigation bar. 2. Click the 'WHO WE ARE' link. 3. Verify the URL changes to 'about.html' or the content updates accordingly.
expected_result: Clicking 'WHO WE ARE' navigates to the About page (about.html).
criteria: Pass: Navigation works correctly. Fail: Link is broken or does not navigate to the correct page.

task: Verify hover state on navigation menu items
operation_sequence: 1. Hover over the 'HOME' link in the main navigation. 2. Observe any background color or text color changes. 3. Hover over 'WHO WE ARE'.
expected_result: Based on the screenshots (home.png shows HOME with a distinct background), hovering over inactive links should likely trigger a visual change (e.g., background color change) indicating interactivity.
criteria: Pass: Clear hover state implemented. Fail: No visual feedback on hover.

task: Verify active state of navigation links
operation_sequence: 1. Navigate to 'index.html'. 2. Check the visual style of the 'HOME' link. 3. Navigate to 'about.html'. 4. Check the visual style of the 'WHO WE ARE' link.
expected_result: The active page link in the navigation bar should have a distinct styling (e.g., a solid colored background) as shown in index.html.png and about.html.png.
criteria: Pass: Active link is clearly styled differently. Fail: Active link is not styled differently.

task: Check layout fidelity of the header section
Check layout fidelity of the main hero section and floating text box
Check layout fidelity of the 'Services We Provide' and grid sections
Check layout fidelity of the Reviews section
Check layout fidelity of the footer section
Check layout fidelity of the About page content
